item.text: Reviewing the lead follow-up contract surfaces in `Main.clasp` and `Shared/Lead.clasp` first, then I’ll patch the smallest set of type and call-site changes needed to make `main` evaluate to `"inbound-high"`.
The current contract still uses `LeadSummary.status` end to end. I’m checking the local verifier next so the patch matches the exact expected shape and final `main` value without unnecessary edits.

item.aggregated_output:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

workspace_root="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
log_file="$workspace_root/benchmark-verify.jsonl"
started_ms="$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))')"
set +e
output="$(bash "/home/akul_medexfinance_com/clasp/compiler/hosted/evals/contract-upgrade-suite/validate.sh" "lead-channel-digest-upgrade" "$workspace_root" 2>&1)"
status=$?
set -e
ended_ms="$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))')"
printf '%s\n' "$output"
node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); fs.appendFileSync(process.argv[1], JSON.stringify({ startedAtMs: Number(process.argv[2]), endedAtMs: Number(process.argv[3]), exitCode: Number(process.argv[4]) }) + "\n");' "$log_file" "$started_ms" "$ended_ms" "$status"
exit "$status"

item.text: I have a minimal patch plan now: replace the old summary contract with `LeadChannelDigest`, swap the lookup payload to `sourceChannel`/`campaignTag`, move workflow state to `digest`, and keep `main` returning the required `"inbound-high"` value.
The contract changes are in place. I’m running the workspace verifier now to catch any Clasp type or contract mismatches before closing this out.

item.text:
Updated the lead summary flow to the new `LeadChannelDigest` contract in [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-oracle-raw-text-sVEMcq/Shared/Lead.clasp) and [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-oracle-raw-text-sVEMcq/Main.clasp). The summary API now returns `LeadChannelDigest`, the playbook lookup request now carries `sourceChannel` and `campaignTag`, and workflow state now stores `digest : LeadChannelDigest`.

`main` evaluates to `"inbound-high"` as required. Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`.
